# FlexDesk - Full-Stack Office Booking System

## Project Overview
FlexDesk is a production-ready web application for managing office desk and meeting room bookings in a hybrid work environment. Built with Next.js 14+, TypeScript, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, and NextAuth.js.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js 14+ (App Router)
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Database**: PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM
- **Authentication**: NextAuth.js
- **Validation**: Zod
- **Deployment**: Vercel-ready

## Development Guidelines
- Use Server Components for data fetching (SSR)
- Server Actions for all mutations (CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE)
- Type-safe throughout using TypeScript
- SEO metadata on all pages
- Responsive design (Mobile, Tablet, Desktop)
- Protected routes via middleware
